---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Who runs into it (students,
facilitators, super-admins, researchers, developers)? How often?

## Proposed solution

What would success look like? Sketch the interaction or the API.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them.

## Scope

- [ ] Engine change (`script.js`, `lib.js`, `localdb.js`, ...)
- [ ] Content change (`case-content.js`, new scenario, i18n)
- [ ] Ops / infra (CI, deploy, monitoring)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Research-pipeline change (R / Python under `scripts/`)

## Impact

- **Users affected:** students / facilitators / both / researchers
- **Privacy implications:** none / collects new data / changes
  retention / changes sharing
- **Breaking change:** yes / no

## Additional context

Mock-ups, links to prior art, references to related issues or PRs.
